title: Norwegian Cod Cakes with Caramelized Pancake Crust
description: A crispy Norwegian twist on traditional cod cakes, topped with a caramelized pancake crust for added crunch.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, mix together cod, pancake mix, eggs, salt, and pepper.
3. Divide the mixture into 6-8 portions, depending on desired size.
4. Shape each portion into a pattie.
5. Coat each pattie with breadcrumbs if using.
6. Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Meanwhile, caramelize the pancake mix in a pan over medium heat until golden brown.
9. Top each cod cake with a spoonful of the caramelized pancake mix.
10. Garnish with crispy fried onions if using.
